disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: New York On Alert After WHO Declares Ebola Emergency
updates.summary_zh: WHO宣布埃博拉紧急状态，纽约进入警戒。

updates.title_en: Experimental Hantavirus Treatment Could Be Used On Sick Cruise Ship Passengers ( Latest Updates )
updates.summary_zh: 实验性汉坦病毒治疗或用于邮轮患者。

updates.title_en: EU receives experimental Hantavirus treatment doses
updates.summary_zh: 欧盟接收实验性汉坦病毒治疗药物。

updates.title_en: Insurers forced to rethink cover amidst Ebola, Andes hantavirus outbreak - Insurance Asia
updates.body_en: Insurers forced to rethink cover amidst Ebola, Andes hantavirus outbreak Insurance Asia
updates.summary_zh: 埃博拉和汉坦病毒疫情迫使保险公司重新评估承保。

updates.title_en: England World Cup base hit by Ebola health alert as deadly disease becomes visible fast
updates.summary_zh: 英格兰世界杯基地因埃博拉健康警报受影响。

updates.title_en: Kansas legislative leaders approve extended monitoring of three residents exposed to hantavirus
updates.summary_zh: 堪萨斯州议会批准延长对三名接触汉坦病毒居民的监测。

updates.title_en: Treating the Andes Strain of the Hantavirus Associated With the Cruise Ship Cluster - Contagion Live
updates.body_en: Treating the Andes Strain of the Hantavirus Associated With the Cruise Ship Cluster Contagion Live
updates.summary_zh: Contagion Live 报道邮轮聚集性疫情相关安第斯株汉坦病毒治疗。

updates.title_en: Trump Admin Bars Key US Researchers From Global Virus Response Talk
updates.summary_zh: 特朗普政府禁止美国关键研究人员参加全球病毒应对会议。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak stable at 13 cases: WHO - NewsNation
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak stable at 13 cases: WHO NewsNation
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称汉坦病毒疫情稳定，共 13 例。

updates.title_en: Australia extends quarantine for hantavirus cruise ship passengers until June 23 - The Independent
updates.body_en: Australia extends quarantine for hantavirus cruise ship passengers until June 23 The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 澳大利亚延长汉坦病毒邮轮乘客隔离至 6 月 23 日。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cruise ship outbreak : Passengers evacuated from MV Hondius must now spend 42 days in quarantine in Australia
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮爆发，乘客在澳大利亚隔离 42 天。

updates.title_en: EU Moves To Secure Emergency Antiviral Supplies As Hantavirus Cases Spread - Arise News
updates.body_en: EU Moves To Secure Emergency Antiviral Supplies As Hantavirus Cases Spread Arise News
updates.summary_zh: 欧盟因汉坦病毒扩散，寻求紧急抗病毒物资。

updates.title_en: WHO says public risk remains low in cruise ship hantavirus outbreak - Telangana Today
updates.body_en: WHO says public risk remains low in cruise ship hantavirus outbreak Telangana Today
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称邮轮汉坦病毒爆发对公众风险仍低。
